lisinopril.description: May cause hypoglycemia. Monitor blood glucose levels closely.
lisinopril.recommendation: Monitor blood glucose, adjust doses as needed

insulin.description: Increased risk of hypoglycemia. Dose adjustments may be needed.
insulin.recommendation: Reduce insulin dose by 10-20% when initiating metformin

alcohol.description: May cause lactic acidosis. Avoid alcohol while taking metformin.

contrast_dye.description: Risk of lactic acidosis. Hold metformin before and after contrast procedures.
contrast_dye.recommendation: Hold 48 hours before and after contrast studies

warfarin.description: Increased risk of bleeding. Avoid combination if possible.
warfarin.recommendation: Consider alternatives or use lowest effective aspirin dose with close INR monitoring

ibuprofen.description: May decrease cardioprotective effects of aspirin and increase GI bleeding risk.
ibuprofen.recommendation: Take aspirin at least 2 hours before ibuprofen

clopidogrel.description: Increased antiplatelet effect. Monitor for bleeding.
clopidogrel.recommendation: Use combination only when clearly indicated, monitor for bleeding

prednisone.description: Increased risk of GI bleeding and ulceration.

potassium.description: May cause hyperkalemia. Monitor potassium levels.
potassium.recommendation: Monitor serum potassium, especially in renal impairment

spironolactone.description: Increased risk of hyperkalemia. Monitor potassium levels closely.

nsaids.description: May reduce antihypertensive effect and increase risk of renal impairment.
nsaids.recommendation: Monitor blood pressure and renal function

lithium.description: May increase lithium levels and toxicity risk.

grapefruit.description: May increase atorvastatin levels up to 250%. Avoid grapefruit juice.

clarithromycin.description: May increase risk of myopathy and rhabdomyolysis.
clarithromycin.recommendation: Consider alternative antibiotic or temporarily hold statin

cyclosporine.description: Dramatically increased risk of myopathy and rhabdomyolysis.
cyclosporine.recommendation: Avoid combination; use alternative statin if needed

gemfibrozil.description: Increased risk of severe myopathy and rhabdomyolysis.
gemfibrozil.recommendation: Avoid combination; consider fenofibrate if fibrate needed

vitamin_k.description: May decrease warfarin effectiveness. Maintain consistent vitamin K intake.
vitamin_k.recommendation: Maintain consistent dietary vitamin K intake

amiodarone.description: Significantly increases warfarin effect. INR may increase by 50-100%.
amiodarone.recommendation: Reduce warfarin dose by 30-50%, monitor INR closely

nsaids.description: Increased risk of GI bleeding. Relative risk increases 13-fold.
nsaids.mechanism: Additive anticoagulant effect and GI toxicity

metronidazole.recommendation: Reduce warfarin dose by 20-30%, monitor INR every 2-3 days

fluconazole.recommendation: Reduce warfarin dose by 25-50%, monitor INR closely

calcium.description: May decrease levothyroxine absorption by up to 40%.
calcium.recommendation: Separate administration by at least 4 hours

iron.recommendation: Separate administration by at least 4 hours

antacids.recommendation: Take levothyroxine on empty stomach, separate from antacids by 4 hours

proton_pump_inhibitors.recommendation: Monitor TSH levels, may need dose increase

insulin.description: Increased risk of hypoglycemia. Monitor blood glucose frequently.
insulin.recommendation: Reduce insulin dose by 20% when starting, monitor glucose closely

oral_diabetes_medications.recommendation: Monitor glucose levels, adjust oral medications as needed

grapefruit.description: Significantly increases simvastatin levels (up to 16-fold). Avoid completely.

warfarin.recommendation: Monitor INR when starting or stopping simvastatin

amlodipine.description: Increases simvastatin levels. Limit simvastatin to 20mg daily.
amlodipine.recommendation: Do not exceed simvastatin 20mg daily with amlodipine

nsaids.description: Significantly increased risk of GI bleeding and ulceration.
nsaids.recommendation: Consider PPI prophylaxis, use lowest effective doses

warfarin.description: May increase anticoagulant effect and bleeding risk.

live_vaccines.recommendation: Avoid live vaccines while on prednisone ≥20mg daily

digoxin.description: May increase digoxin toxicity due to hypokalemia.
digoxin.recommendation: Monitor potassium and digoxin levels closely

lithium.recommendation: Monitor lithium levels, may need dose reduction

aminoglycosides.description: Increased risk of ototoxicity and nephrotoxicity.

sertraline.recommendation: Monitor for agitation, confusion, rapid heart rate, high blood pressure

ondansetron.recommendation: Use with caution, monitor for serotonin syndrome

tramadol.recommendation: Use combination with caution, educate patient about symptoms

warfarin.recommendation: Monitor INR and for signs of bleeding

nsaids.recommendation: Monitor for unusual bleeding or bruising

clopidogrel.recommendation: Consider alternative PPI (pantoprazole least affected) or H2 blocker

clopidogrel.description: Significantly reduces antiplatelet effect of clopidogrel.
clopidogrel.recommendation: Avoid combination; use alternative PPI or H2 blocker

warfarin.recommendation: Monitor INR closely, may need dose reduction

theophylline.description: May increase theophylline levels causing toxicity.
theophylline.recommendation: Monitor theophylline levels, reduce dose by 50%

simvastatin.recommendation: Use with caution, educate about muscle pain

aspirin.recommendation: Use combination only when clearly indicated

trimethoprim.description: Increased risk of bone marrow suppression.
